title: A&R Watch
subtitle: {label} scouting radar — {count} emerging artists under watch.

guard.title: Label view only
guard.description: A&R Watch is the label's scouting tool: emerging talent detection and investment scoring. It is not available in artist view.

scoring.title: Scoring — {name}
scoring.description: Deterministic estimate based on current audience, 30-day momentum and Day 1 Index.
scoring.conservativeHint: 30% of current momentum sustained over the year
scoring.disclaimer: Demo model: purely indicative projection computed on simulated data. This is neither a valuation nor investment advice.
